/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -rdynamic -pthread CMakeFiles/rosconsole-assertion_test.dir/test/assertion_test.cpp.o  -o /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rosconsole/lib/rosconsole/rosconsole-assertion_test   -L/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/rosconsole/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/rosconsole/gtest:/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/build_isolated/rosconsole/gtest/googlemock/gtest:/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rosconsole/lib:/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rosconsole/lib/librosconsole.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rosconsole/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rosconsole/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/librostime.so /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/install_isolated/lib/libcpp_common.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 -lboost_regex -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic -pthread
